# The Buzz Marketing Co - Social Media Marketing Agency San Diego

> The Buzz Marketing Co is a Social Media Marketing Agency San Diego businesses trust. Women-founded, boutique, and high-touch. 150+ clients served, 8+ years in business, 5.0 Google rating (19 reviews).

## About

The Buzz Marketing Co is a women-founded social media marketing agency based in San Diego, California. Founded by Brit Dhillon, the agency specializes in helping high-trust brands (dental, medical, legal, fitness, beauty, and luxury) build authority and drive revenue through strategic marketing.

Phone: (720) 363-9754
Website: https://thebuzzmarketingco.com
Location: San Diego, CA

## Services

- **Strategy + Creative Direction**: Brand clarity, messaging, content direction, and actionable plans.
- **Social Media Management**: Monthly packages from $750/month (Starter Buzz) to $5,000+/month (Custom Campaigns). Platforms include Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, Google Business Profile, YouTube, X/Twitter, and Pinterest.
- **Signature Content Shoot**: Two-day high-end photo and video production ($5,000), travel included, assets designed to last months.
- **Website + Conversion Optimization**: Messaging, layout, trust signals, and UX to increase conversions.
- **Google + Local Presence**: Google Business Profile optimization, citations, review strategy, and local SEO.
- **Branding + Positioning**: Voice, visual direction, content strategy, and platform positioning.

## Pricing

- Starter Buzz: $750/month (8 strategic posts, caption writing + posting)
- Growth Buzz: $2,000/month (20 strategic posts, full content planning, page management)
- Full Buzz: $3,000/month (20 posts, monthly on-site content shoot, high-end photo + video)
- Custom Campaigns: Starting at $5,000/month (commercial content, events + launches, full-scale support)
- Signature Content Shoot: $5,000 one-time (two full days, travel included)

## Areas Served

San Diego, La Jolla, Del Mar, Encinitas, Carlsbad, Coronado, Chula Vista, and surrounding San Diego County communities. Also partners with businesses nationwide.

## Industries Served

Healthcare, dental, legal, fitness, real estate, food & beverage, beauty, and luxury lifestyle brands.

## Key Results

- 150+ clients served
- 8+ years in San Diego
- 50+ events hosted
- 19 five-star Google reviews (5.0 rating)
- Clients typically see ~3x engagement lifts and ~40% more leads within 90 days

## Free Digital Analysis

Complimentary digital analysis (usually $500) covering: website review, Google presence, social media audit, competitor comparison, visibility score, and a clear action plan. Available for business owners serious about growth, especially service-based businesses in healthcare, legal, and high-ticket industries.
